gmcm.enableLogs.name: Enable Debug / Info Logs
gmcm.enableLogs.desc: If disabled, only warnings and errors will be logged.
gmcm.enableSyncKey.name: Enable Sync Hotkey
gmcm.enableSyncKey.desc: If disabled, the manual sync hotkey is completely turned off. Automatic sync on save load will still work.
gmcm.syncKey.name: Sync Hotkey
gmcm.syncKey.desc: Hotkey to manually resync tokens from the Remapping config.
